title: Forward Attack Support
description: You are a forward in an attacking position. Support your teammate who has the ball in a wide position and create a goal-scoring opportunity.
teaching_point: Make a diagonal run into the central channel or far post area to create a scoring option for the wide ball carrier.

feedback_hints.success: You created a clear scoring option in the central channel or at the far post.
feedback_hints.common_error: You stayed too wide or too deep, reducing the goal threat and congesting the wide player's space.
feedback_hints.alternate_valid: This was still a workable position — it gave the ball carrier an option even if outside the ideal zone.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: When the ball is wide, move to create depth and a second scoring option rather than clustering near the ball.
success_points: You made a diagonal run into the central channel, creating a genuine scoring threat.
Your movement gave the wide ball carrier a clear passing option inside the defensive block.
You separated from the nearest CB and created a second-post goal threat.
error_points: You stayed too wide, clustering with the ball carrier and cutting off the passing lane inside.
You positioned too deep, letting the defence reorganise before you could threaten the circle.
Your run was too flat — you needed to move beyond the nearest defender to create space.
alternate_points: This gave the ball carrier a usable option on the edge of the circle, even if not the ideal run.
Your position still offered a pass target even without reaching the best scoring pocket.
